## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] `mvn test` passes locally (JDK 21).
- [ ] If I touched JDK 25-only code, it is gated with `@EnabledOnJre(JRE.JAVA_25)` and lives where
      the build excludes it below JDK 25.
- [ ] New exercises follow the existing pattern (`@Disabled` test + reference solution).
- [ ] I updated any affected docs / quest maps / XP totals.
- [ ] My code matches the surrounding style.
